title: Moosend vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business.
h1: Moosend vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Moosend and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Moosend emphasizes affordability and automation with a freemium model, while Constant Contact focuses on simplicity and integrated marketing tools for nonprofits and local businesses. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right platform for your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, SMS, social ads, e-commerce

choose_a_if: You want to start for free with 1,000 subscribers and scale affordably
You need unlimited email sending and advanced automation workflows
You prioritize cost savings and don't require integrated SMS or social ads
choose_b_if: You need event management, SMS marketing, and social media ad tools in one platform
You run a nonprofit or local business and want a trusted established provider
E-commerce features are essential to your marketing strategy

faq.q: Is Moosend better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Moosend excels in affordability and automation with unlimited emails, making it ideal for cost-conscious businesses. Constant Contact offers more integrated marketing features like SMS, event management, and social ads, which may be better for businesses needing an all-in-one platform. Check your specific requirements to decide.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $0 for up to 1,000 subscribers with unlimited emails, versus Constant Contact's $12/month minimum with no free tier. For growing businesses, Moosend's $9 entry point still undercuts Constant Contact. However, if you need SMS or event management, Constant Contact's integrated tools might offer better overall value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your email lists and contact data from Constant Contact to Moosend. Both platforms typically support standard import/export formats like CSV. Before switching, review Moosend's feature set to ensure it covers your current workflows, particularly if you heavily use Constant Contact's event management or SMS features.
